languages.text: "Я нашел себе замену. "Руолдо" захотел поиграться властью — и я ему великодушно позволил. Жаль, правил он недолго. А вот я... сменил костюмчик, заняв место наблюдателя. Наловчился острословить. И даже вошел во вкус".

traits.locale_text: "Я нашел себе замену. "Руолдо" захотел поиграться властью — и я ему великодушно позволил. Жаль, правил он недолго. А вот я... сменил костюмчик, заняв место наблюдателя. Наловчился острословить. И даже вошел во вкус".

languages.text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."
languages.original_text: "Я нашел себе замену. "Руолдо" захотел поиграться властью — и я ему великодушно позволил. Жаль, правил он недолго. А вот я... сменил костюмчик, заняв место наблюдателя. Наловчился острословить. И даже вошел во вкус".

"I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

languages.text: “我找到了个替代品。‘罗尔多’想玩权力的游戏，而我大大方方地允许他玩这个游戏。真遗憾，他在总督的位子上没坐多久。至于我，我换了套戏服，在观众之中找到了一席之地。我磨砺着我的智慧，甚至已经开始爱上这个角色了。”
languages.original_text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

traits.locale_text: “我找到了个替代品。‘罗尔多’想玩权力的游戏，而我大大方方地允许他玩这个游戏。真遗憾，他在总督的位子上没坐多久。至于我，我换了套戏服，在观众之中找到了一席之地。我磨砺着我的智慧，甚至已经开始爱上这个角色了。”

languages.text: «Encontré un sustituto. "Ruoldo" quería jugar al juego del poder, y yo tuve a bien permitírselo. Lástima que su reinado no durase mucho. Por otra parte, yo me cambié de disfraz y ocupé un lugar entre los espectadores. Agucé mi ingenio. Hasta empecé a disfrutarlo».
languages.original_text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

traits.locale_text: «Encontré un sustituto. "Ruoldo" quería jugar al juego del poder, y yo tuve a bien permitírselo. Lástima que su reinado no durase mucho. Por otra parte, yo me cambié de disfraz y ocupé un lugar entre los espectadores. Agucé mi ingenio. Hasta empecé a disfrutarlo».

languages.text: "Bir yedek buldum. 'Ruoldo', güç oyunu oynamak istedi ve ona nezaketle izin verdim. Uzun süre hüküm sürmemesi yazık oldu. Bense kostüm değiştirdim ve seyircilerin arasına oturdum. Zekâmı biledim. Hatta bundan zevk almaya başladım."
languages.original_text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

traits.locale_text: "Bir yedek buldum. 'Ruoldo', güç oyunu oynamak istedi ve ona nezaketle izin verdim. Uzun süre hüküm sürmemesi yazık oldu. Bense kostüm değiştirdim ve seyircilerin arasına oturdum. Zekâmı biledim. Hatta bundan zevk almaya başladım."

languages.text: 「俺は身代わりを見つけた。『ルオルド』は権力を持ちたがっていたので、ご丁寧にそうさせた。可哀想に、彼の統治は長くはなかった。一方で、俺は慣習を変え、観衆の中に紛れた。俺は知恵を磨き、それを楽しみ始めさえした」
languages.original_text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

traits.locale_text: 「俺は身代わりを見つけた。『ルオルド』は権力を持ちたがっていたので、ご丁寧にそうさせた。可哀想に、彼の統治は長くはなかった。一方で、俺は慣習を変え、観衆の中に紛れた。俺は知恵を磨き、それを楽しみ始めさえした」

languages.text: « J'ai trouvé un remplaçant. "Ruoldo" voulait jouer à celui qui a du pouvoir, alors je lui en ai donné l'occasion. Dommage qu'il n'ait pas régné longtemps... De mon côté, j'ai changé de costume et ai pris grand plaisir à m'installer du côté des spectateurs. Ça m'a permis d'aiguiser mon esprit. Ça commençait même à me plaire. »
languages.original_text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai trouvé un remplaçant. "Ruoldo" voulait jouer à celui qui a du pouvoir, alors je lui en ai donné l'occasion. Dommage qu'il n'ait pas régné longtemps... De mon côté, j'ai changé de costume et ai pris grand plaisir à m'installer du côté des spectateurs. Ça m'a permis d'aiguiser mon esprit. Ça commençait même à me plaire. »

languages.text: "Ich habe einen Ersatz gefunden. 'Ruoldo' wollte den Mächtigen spielen, und ich ließ ihn gnädig gewähren. Ein Jammer, dass er nicht lange regiert hat. Ich dagegen habe mein Kostüm gewechselt und mich unter die Zuschauer gemischt. Ich habe meinen Witz geschärft. Ich fing sogar an, Gefallen daran zu finden."
languages.original_text: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Pity he didn't rule for long. I, on the other hand, had a costume change and took a seat among the spectators. I sharpened my wit. I even began to enjoy it."

Ich dagegen habe mein Kostüm gewechselt und mich unter die Zuschauer gemischt. Ich habe meinen Witz geschärft. Ich fing sogar an, Gefallen daran zu finden."
